occupation: Senior Account Lead at London City Airport

experiences.title: Sales Account Manager
experiences.description: Upon completion of my trial period as a Sales Executive, I was appointed to Sales Account Manager handling all business for media owner Popcorn Outdoor in dealing through OOH Specialist company Posterscope. I would arrange meetings and Presentations on behalf of Popcorn as well as respond to briefs from clients who are looking to target the 18-24 demographic by using our ooh formats in both Universities and Music venues.

experiences.title: Customer Service Representative
experiences.description: Covering several key brands in insurethebox, Drive like a girl and Tesco Bank Box Insurance. The innovation of telematics insurance is well known and is becoming increasingly popular on a global spectrum. It is a platform for me to demonstrate the highest possible customer service and educate potential and current policy holders on the overwhelming benefits that the box possesses.

experiences.title: Collections Advisor
experiences.description: Working in a company such as Santander UK provided me with the opportunity and the desire to progress from within. Initially joining on a part time basis, my responsibilities quickly grew from handling areas in retail into the Santander banking division ranging from products such as long term loans to the highly popular 123 current accounts.
experiences.location: Cobalt Buisness Park, Newcastle Upon Tyne

experiences.title: Trainee Salesperson
experiences.description: Being my 1st full time position, the experience I gained at Systems Technology was substantial. It was during this time I developed key experience in surrounding the highs that are reached in a sales environment. I was provided the freedom of my own area for Sevenoaks and Tunbridge Wells to sell our competitive products and services as well as learning the everyday life of a money motivated Salesperson.
